label: Plastic Removed by The Ocean Cleanup
deltaNote: 2025 was most productive year on record at 25M kg extracted. Combined GPGP ocean systems and river Interceptors.

label: Plastic Entering Oceans Per Year
contestNote: Estimates range 8–23 million MT/year depending on methodology and year

label: Total Plastic Accumulated in World's Oceans
source: Science Journal, Jambeck et al. (cumulative 2024 estimate)
contestNote: Sea floor and deep-water plastic largely unmeasured; actual total may exceed 200M MT

label: Global Ocean Under Marine Protection
deltaNote: Milestone crossed April 2026: 10% of oceans now designated protected or conserved. Only 1.3% has assessed management effectiveness. Kunming-Montreal 30x30 goal requires tripling in 4 years.

label: North Atlantic Right Whale Population
deltaNote: IUCN upgraded to Critically Endangered April 2026. ~70 reproductively active females. 22-23 calves spotted November 2025–April 2026 — a rare increase. Federal court ruled lobster industry violates ESA (April 9, 2026). Gear entanglement remains primary threat.

label: Global Coral Reef Area Bleached — 4th Global Event
delta: Largest bleaching event ever recorded: Jan 2023 – Sep 2025
deltaNote: 4th global mass bleaching event impacted 84.4% of world reef area across 83 countries over 2.5 years. GBR: 73% of surveyed area bleached in 2024.

label: High Seas Treaty (BBNJ) Parties — In Force
source: UN BBNJ Agreement / High Seas Alliance (Apr 2026)
deltaNote: 145 countries have signed; 92 have ratified as of April 2026. Australia ratified March 2026 (88th party). CoP1 scheduled January 11–22, 2027. PrepCom 3 concluded April 2, 2026.

label: World's Coral Reefs Under Bleaching-Level Stress
contestNote: Percentage fluctuates with ocean temperatures; El Niño years see spikes above 80%. Cumulative impact of 4th global bleaching event reached 84.4% by Sep 2025.
